mnemonics.title: Environment Responsibility
mnemonics.content: **I** Prefer (IaaS) - I manage Platform, Runtime, App. **P**izza (PaaS) - Provider manages Platform; I manage Runtime, App. **F**ast (FaaS) - Provider manages Platform, Runtime; I manage just the Function/App. (Note: This is a twist on the classic 'as a Service' mnemonic, focusing on the environment perspective).
